checks.name: Operator-only reporting user cannot see partner controls or revenue-share data
Operator default toolbar keeps advanced and custom controls out of the primary path
Operator date-range control keeps all presets and reveals dates only for Custom
Operator More filters contains visible Daily/Weekly/Monthly and one payment selector
Operator KPIs, daily totals, and detail rows reconcile exactly
Operator fresh status is separate from a loaded zero-sales date
Operator breakdown control supports keyboard focus movement
Operator summary changes to weekly grouping while retaining reconciled totals
Operator machine and payment filters scope every total and export
Operator desktop has no horizontal overflow
Operator mobile defaults to compact filters and collapsed detail
Operator mobile preserves exact daily reconciliation
Operator mobile is usable at 390px without horizontal overflow
Operator stale import state remains distinct from loaded zero sales
Operator unavailable import state remains distinct from loaded zero sales
Partner all-machines view shows six actions, locations, duplicate-name context, and zero sales
Partner machine picker becomes searchable at the six-machine threshold
Partner row action supports keyboard selection and a persistent selected scope
Corporate Partner hides non-blocking internal notes without false review messaging
Partner selected-machine KPIs, history, and export retain machine scope
Partner desktop has no horizontal overflow
Partner mobile all-machines view preserves location and action context
Partner mobile selected zero-sales machine keeps scope, history, back action, and no overflow
Super Admin can open and leave a scoped partner machine drilldown
Operator compact boundary 360px has no horizontal overflow
Operator expanded-filter boundary 360px has no horizontal overflow
Operator compact boundary 414px has no horizontal overflow
Operator expanded-filter boundary 414px has no horizontal overflow
Partner responsive boundary 414px keeps all-machine and selected-machine scopes in bounds
Baseline account remains blocked from reporting
Signed-out reporting route still redirects to login
No unexpected browser errors occurred
